slay.title: Survive the Excrucis , slay the Nightwarden

subtitle.text: He grew a pantheon and none of them worked but one. You are the experiment he never finished.

description: The terminal trial. The Nightwarden , the god-maker whose failed prototypes you have been hunting since the End portal opened.
Two-stage gate: you slew his one working dragon to open the deep End; now you survive his Excrucis ritual.
On his death he drops the Path to Divinity , the scroll the Convent would not let into the Stoneborn curriculum.
Kill him, and the last knowledge in the world is yours.
